continuous_policy_forward: INPUT: x [B, d] — current asset prices (log-normalized)
z ~ N(m_theta, lambda * I)  → [B, d*(d+1)//2]  (reparameterized sample)
sigma = sigma_mid + sigma_half * z_sigma  → [B, d]  (volatility squashed to bounds)
L = cvine.partial_to_cholesky(z_rho)  → [B, d, d]  (lower-triangular Cholesky factor)
rho = L @ L.T  → [B, d, d]  (correlation matrix, PSD by construction)
a = diag(sigma) @ L  → [B, d, d]  (volatility matrix for log-Euler)
log_euler_step: INPUT: x [B,d], a [B,d,d], xi [B,d], dt, r
ppo_update: GIVEN: (x, a, xi, z, adv) batch from data collection under theta_old
ratio = exp(Gaussian log-ratio using m_new, m_old, z, lambda)  → [B]
ppo_loss = -mean(min(ratio * adv_norm, clipped_ratio * adv_norm))  (negate for ascent)

exploration.note_sigmoid: ASSUMED: sigmoid annealing formula from Figure 1

penalty.note: Only applies to continuous policy, d>=3

risk_assessment.description: Recursive formula referenced but not fully spelled out in paper; must implement from Joe (2006) and JKL (2009) correctly
risk_assessment.mitigation: Validate output against known d=3 formula given in paper; add unit tests checking PSD and unit diagonal

risk_assessment.description: Confidence 0.72; exact formula not given, only Figure 1 shape described
risk_assessment.mitigation: Implement as configurable; expose inflection point and steepness as config params

risk_assessment.description: Confidence 0.85; using PyTorch defaults may slightly differ from paper experiments
risk_assessment.mitigation: Use defaults; add TODO comment; expose as config

risk_assessment.risk: Path-dependent state augmentation for Call Sharpe
risk_assessment.description: Requires augmenting state with A1_t and A2_t (accumulated realized vol + last monitoring price); non-trivial state management
risk_assessment.mitigation: Implement as a StatefulPayoff class with explicit augmented state tensor

risk_assessment.risk: Numerical stability of C-vine when partial correlations near ±1
risk_assessment.description: tanh squashing prevents exact ±1 but large |z| values can cause near-singular L
risk_assessment.mitigation: Clamp tanh output to (-1+eps, 1-eps) with eps=1e-6
